def positive_observability_context_extracted_manually_at_many_call_sites():
    rule_id = "observability_context_extracted_manually_at_many_call_sites"
    family = "observability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag repeated manual extraction of the same tracing or logging context."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
